tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT li.id FROM linear_issues li WHERE li.state = 'done' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM github_pull_requests gpr WHERE gpr.closes_linear = li.id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM github_pull_requests gpr WHERE gpr.closes_linear = li.id AND gpr.state = 'merged')"}
